markdownRemark.html:
Configuration of the dataset for the value set component

Type: DataSetProps | (DataSetProps) => DataSetProps

Other related properties and methods:

options: Menu dataset for the dropdown component

getOptions(record): Get the options dataset; also applicable to fields with lookupCode and lovCode set

fetchLookup(noCache, record): Request lookup data; if cached, returns the cached data directly

Basic Usage

// Dropdown data source
  const optionsDS = new DataSet({
    fields: [
      {name: 'meaning', type: 'string'},
      {name: 'value', type: 'string'},
    ],
    data: [
      {meaning: 'Male', value: 'M'},
      {meaning: 'Female', value: 'F'},
    ],
  });

  ds = new DataSet({
    autoCreate: true,
    fields: [
      {
        name: 'code_string',
        type: 'object',
        lovCode: 'LOV_CODE',
        optionsProps: (dsProps) => {
          console.log(dsProps);
          return dsProps;
        },
      },
      // Use options to implement a simple dropdown
      {name: 'select', options: optionsDS}
    ],
  });
  // Get the options dataset
  ds.getField('code_string').getOptions(ds.current);
// Re-fetch the latest value set data
  ds.getField('code_string').fetchLookup(true, ds.current);

Implementation Logic

When creating the data source for the value set component, the value set dataset configuration passed through optionsProps will be merged with the default configuration. The data source for the value set component is then instantiated based on the final configuration.

Notes

optionsProps is the configuration for the value set data source, which means it can basically handle all configurations of a DataSet. For example, you can configure the URL for querying the value set, events, queryFields (search fields), etc.

Applicable Scenarios

When you need to perform additional operations on the value set data source, you can pass the extra configuration via optionsProps. For instance, you may want to handle specific behavior of the value set data source through event listening.

Give it a Try

Modify the corresponding value set configuration and observe the changes in the Lov. Use options to implement a simple dropdown.
